title: Addition of Entities to the Entity List
note: Huawei and 68 non-U.S. affiliates added to the Entity List.

title: Temporary General License
note: Creates the initial 90-day temporary general license for listed Huawei entities.

title: Temporary General License: Extension of Validity; Clarifications to Authorized Transactions and Corrective Amendments
note: Extends Huawei TGL through Nov. 18, 2019.

title: Temporary General License: Extension of Validity
note: Extends Huawei TGL through Feb. 16, 2020.

title: Temporary General License: Extension of Validity
note: Extends Huawei TGL through Apr. 1, 2020.

title: Temporary General License: Extension of Validity
note: Extends Huawei TGL through May 15, 2020.

title: Temporary General License: Extension of Validity
note: Extends Huawei TGL through Aug. 13, 2020 and signals possible elimination.

title: Export Administration Regulations: Amendments to General Prohibition Three (Foreign-Produced Direct Product Rule) and the Entity List
note: Targets Huawei’s access to certain foreign-produced items made with U.S. technology or software.

title: Addition of Huawei Non-U.S. Affiliates to the Entity List, the Removal of Temporary General License, and Amendments to General Prohibition Three (Foreign-Produced Direct Product Rule)
note: Adds 38 more Huawei affiliates, removes the TGL, and further tightens the Huawei FDP rule.

title: Public Notice: Covered List (Updated March 12, 2021)
note: Initial FCC Covered List includes Huawei, ZTE, Hytera, Hikvision, and Dahua.

title: FCC Bans Authorizations for Devices That Pose National Security Threat
note: Implements the Secure Equipment Act by blocking new equipment authorization for covered equipment.

title: BIS Imposes $300 Million Civil Penalty Against Seagate for Shipping Hard Disk Drives to Huawei in Violation of U.S. Export Controls
note: BIS settlement with Seagate over Huawei-related FDP rule violations.

title: Addition of Entities to the Entity List, Revision of Entry on the Entity List, and Removal of Entities From the Entity List
note: Adds SMIC and related affiliates to the Entity List; advanced-node items face a presumption of denial.

title: Implementation of Additional Export Controls: Certain Advanced Computing and Semiconductor Manufacturing Items; Supercomputer and Semiconductor End Use; Entity List Modification
note: The October 2022 advanced-computing and semiconductor-manufacturing rule.

title: Revisions to the Unverified List; Clarifications to Activities and Criteria That May Lead to Additions to the Entity List
note: Adds 31 PRC entities to the UVL after BIS could not complete end-use checks.

title: Additions and Revisions to the Entity List and Conforming Removal From the Unverified List
note: Adds 36 entities to the Entity List and removes related entries from the UVL.

title: Implementation of Additional Export Controls: Certain Advanced Computing Items; Supercomputer and Semiconductor End Use; Updates and Corrections
note: Updates and corrects the October 2022 advanced-computing control package.

title: Export Controls on Semiconductor Manufacturing Items
note: Updates semiconductor-manufacturing-item controls.

title: Implementation of Additional Export Controls: Certain Advanced Computing Items; Supercomputer and Semiconductor End Use; Updates and Corrections
note: Provides corrections and additional clarifications to the Oct. 2023 rule package.

title: Federal Acquisition Regulation: Prohibition on Certain Semiconductor Products and Services
note: Begins federal procurement rulemaking on covered semiconductor products and services.

title: Additions and Modifications to the Entity List; Removals From the Validated End-User (VEU) Program
note: Adds 140 entities to the Entity List and tightens semiconductor ecosystem controls.

title: Foreign-Produced Direct Product Rule Additions, and Refinements to Controls for Advanced Computing and Semiconductor Manufacturing Items
note: Companion December 2024 IFR adding HBM controls and new FDP refinements for advanced-node IC production.

title: Federal Acquisition Regulation: Prohibition on Certain Semiconductor Products and Services
note: ANPR beginning FAR implementation of Section 5949 covered-semiconductor restrictions.

title: Federal Acquisition Regulation: Prohibition on Certain Semiconductor Products and Services
note: Extends comment period for the covered-semiconductor ANPR to August 2, 2024.

title: Federal Acquisition Regulation: Prohibition on Certain Semiconductor Products and Services
note: Proposed FAR rule implementing Section 5949 and explicitly naming SMIC, CXMT, and YMTC as covered semiconductor sources.

title: Framework for Artificial Intelligence Diffusion
note: BIS framework creating worldwide RS controls and authorization pathways for advanced-computing IC clusters and AI diffusion.

title: Implementation of Additional Due Diligence Measures for Advanced Computing Integrated Circuits; Amendments and Clarifications; and Extension of Comment Period
note: BIS IFR adding additional due-diligence measures for foundries and OSATs, with clarifications and extended comment period.

title: Additions to the Entity List
note: Foundry-related Entity List action adding 16 entities, including Sophgo-linked entities, with diversion risk to Huawei cited.

title: Implementation of Additional Due Diligence Measures for Advanced Computing Integrated Circuits; Amendments and Clarifications; and Extension of Comment Period; Correction
note: Correction to the January 16, 2025 due-diligence IFR revising ECCN 3A090 license requirements.

title: Revision to License Review Policy for Advanced Computing Commodities
note: BIS final rule moving certain commercially available advanced-computing commodities to case-by-case review for China/Macau under conditions.

title: Notice of Availability of Designation of Chinese Military Companies
note: DoD notice making available the Chinese military companies designation list, which includes ChangXin Memory Technologies, Inc. (CXMT).

title: Additions and Revisions to the Entity List
note: BIS final rule adding 32 entities, including firms that acquired U.S.-origin semiconductor manufacturing equipment for SMIC-listed parties and firms posing circumvention/diversion risk.

title: Expansion of Validated End-User Authorization: Data Center Validated End-User Authorization
note: Introduces Data Center VEU to facilitate exports of certain CCL items to preapproved trusted end users.

title: Addition of Entities to and Revision of Entry on the Entity List
note: January 2025 Entity List action and revision of an existing entry tied to PRC military modernization concerns.

title: Additions and Modifications to the Entity List
note: March 2025 BIS action adding 70 entities and modifying Entity List entries.

title: Revocation of Validated End-User Authorizations in the People’s Republic of China
note: Removes Intel Semiconductor (Dalian), Samsung China Semiconductor, and SK hynix Semiconductor (China) from the VEU program.

title: Additions to the Entity List
note: October 2025 BIS rule adding 29 entries, including 19 under China and additional Turkey/UAE-linked entries.

title: Advancing United States Leadership in Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure
note: Executive Order 14141 directing steps to ensure future frontier AI can continue to be built in the United States.

title: Adjusting Imports of Semiconductors, Semiconductor Manufacturing Equipment, and Their Derivative Products Into the United States
note: Section 232 proclamation concluding imports threaten national security and directing a plan of action.
